name: 昭昭

appearance.face: 粉嫩婴儿脸，后长成可爱圆脸，眼睛灵动
appearance.body: 婴儿期娇小，后蹦跳活泼
appearance.hair: 细软黑发，扎小揪或散开
appearance.distinguishing_features: 阳光开朗的笑脸与聪明灵动的眼神

visual_reference: Adorable Chinese toddler girl age 3, chubby pink cheeks with bright intelligent eyes and fair skin, soft black hair in small buns, wearing colorful toddler hanfu jacket, sunny cheerful smile, ancient Chinese noble family setting, highly detailed masterpiece
personality: 活泼开朗、聪明好学、喜欢花朵珠宝与史论
arc: 起点：早产出生 → 转变：江南成长活泼 → 终点：堆雪认爹爹
scene_presence: 生产后出生、满月宴、高江南生活、堆雪认父

relationships.dynamic: 父女亲情，沈词宠爱送礼
